whole_image_visual_findings: The follow-up produced a coherent hyperrealistic head-and-shoulders portrait with stable facial proportions, aligned eyes, clean lips, believable hair shape, clothed shoulders, and a simple coherent background.
Eye readability improved compared with the matrix baseline and remains clear enough for local quality-development use.
No visible Canny/control-map leakage, colored stains, dark edge halos, harsh line transfer, text, watermark, or malformed collar/jaw boundary appeared.

The follow-up regressed on the skin-texture goal: the face reads more smooth/editorial and beauty-polished than the preferred softer-edge matrix sample, with less visible pore and beard/stubble detail.
Hands and full body are not visible and remain outside this Canny local crop certification boundary.

followup_helped: Eye visibility and catchlight readability improved.
followup_regressed: Skin surface became smoother and less naturally textured than the preferred softer-edge sample.
Overall image reads more studio-beauty polished, which is not the desired direction for hyperreal material realism.

next_action: Use canny_w69_matrix_softer_edges_seed711570102 as the preferred local Canny candidate for now.
